title: SO(10) to Standard-Model symmetry-breaking cascade
statement: The emergent SO(10) breaks to $SU(3)_c\times SU(2)_L\times U(1)_Y$ through the TECT vacuum alignment, with the intermediate-scale chain (e.g. via $SU(5)$ or Pati--Salam) fixed by the condensate structure.
scope: OPEN scaffold. The breaking chain from the emergent GUT group (D1) to the observed SM gauge group (GOVERNANCE sec-2 Sector-D). Connects the SO(10) bundle to the low-energy gauge content.
falsifier: A vacuum alignment that fails to leave $SU(3)\times SU(2)\times U(1)$ unbroken, or that leaves an extra unbroken gauge factor incompatible with observation.
no_overclaim: The breaking cascade is not derived; the SM gauge group is not yet shown to be the TECT residual symmetry.
next_action: Determine the condensate-induced adjoint/spinor VEV directions and the unbroken subgroup at each stage.
